mapper.update:
WITH RECURSIVE InviteTree AS ( SELECT id, pid FROM u_member WHERE id = #{pid} and deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT u.id, u.pid FROM u_member u INNER JOIN InviteTree it ON u.id = it.pid where u.deleted = 0 ) update u_member
pid = #{pid},
where id = #{id} and pid is null and not exists ( SELECT 1 FROM InviteTree WHERE id = #{id} )

update u_member
invite_num = invite_num + #{inviteNum},
direct_invite_num = direct_invite_num + #{directInviteNum},
valid_direct_invite_num = valid_direct_invite_num + #{validDirectInviteNum},
invite_level_id = invite_level_id + #{inviteLevelId},
level_id = level_id + #{levelId},
prize_amount = prize_amount + #{prizeAmount},
performance = performance + #{performance},
team_performance = team_performance + #{teamPerformance},
id = #{id}

UPDATE u_member AS ff
ff.invite_num = ff.invite_num + #{inviteNum},
ff.frozen_performance = ff.frozen_performance + #{frozenPerformance},
ff.team_performance = ff.team_performance + #{teamPerformance},
ff.performance = ff.performance + #{performance},
ff.performance_update_at = #{performanceUpdateAt},
WHERE EXISTS( WITH RECURSIVE cte AS ( select b.id,b.pid from u_member b where b.deleted = 0 and b.id = #{id} union all select a.id,a.pid from u_member a inner join cte c on a.ID = c.pid where a.deleted = 0 ) select 1 from cte ct where ct.id = ff.id and ct.id <> #{id} )
mapper.select: select ifnull(max(performance + team_performance),0) highest, ifnull(sum(performance + team_performance),0) `total` from u_member where pid = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.update:
update u_member
invite_num = invite_num + #{inviteNum},
prize_amount = prize_amount + #{prizeAmount},
performance = performance + #{performance},
team_performance = team_performance + #{teamPerformance},
frozen_performance = frozen_performance + #{frozenPerformance},
id = #{id}
and prize_amount >= -#{prizeAmount}
and performance >= -#{performance},
and team_performance >= -#{teamPerformance},
and frozen_performance > -#{frozenPerformance},
mapper.select: select level_id, count(*) num from u_member where deleted = 0 and level_id != 0 group by level_id
mapper.update:
update u_member
invite_num = invite_num + #{e.inviteNum},
prize_amount = prize_amount + #{e.prizeAmount},
performance = performance + #{e.performance},
team_performance = team_performance + #{e.teamPerformance},
frozen_performance = frozen_performance + #{e.frozenPerformance},
id in
#{item}
